examples.text: 5 years after graduation. [25] This suggests that the problem isn't really to do with specific students studying specific degrees, but really with the economy as a whole. Regardless of what they've studied,
examples.explanation: 毕业五年后。[25] 这表明问题并非真正与特定学生攻读特定学位有关，而是与经济整体有关。无论他们学过什么。

reviewSessions.example_text: 5 years after graduation. [25] This suggests that the problem isn't really to do with specific students studying specific degrees, but really with the economy as a whole. Regardless of what they've studied,
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，表达了“总体上、整体而言”的意思。
matched_points: 结合例句可理解为“就经济整体而言/从整体来看”
